title: [MTR3/4] New South Wales EMU Trains
description: This resource pack adds New South Wales EMU Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![h set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80acfdf76e2f32f3d8dab420f0bb905f6474fba5.png)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds NSW Trainlink EMU Trains in Australia.

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR3, MTR4 Beta 13~) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 version (NTE)

## Terms

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars (information could be found in Spreadsheet - could be found at wiki link)

## Contents

* New South Wales V Set (SRA, CityRail, NSW livery)
* New South Wales H Set
* New South Wales D Set

Each train has freelength & real formation. There's two rider offset (Driver pos / upper decker) for each train for MTR3
For MTR4, Passenger need to jump to take middle Carriage's upper deck. It's not a finished project yet.
